---
title: "Q10 of Ra and Rh analysis"
author: "Yaxian"
date: "1/2/2024"
output: html_document
---
```{r ,message=FALSE, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# Set chunks defaults; these options will be applied to all subsequent chunks
knitr::opts_chunk$set(results = 'hide', message = TRUE, include = TRUE, echo = FALSE,
                      fig.height = 4.5, fig.width = 8, cache = TRUE)
OUTPUT_DIR		<- "outputs/"
LOG_DIR			<- "logs/"
SEPARATOR		<- "-------------------------------------------"
DATA_DIR <- 'data'
if(!file.exists(OUTPUT_DIR)) dir.create(OUTPUT_DIR)
if(!file.exists(LOG_DIR)) dir.create( LOG_DIR )
library(cowplot)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(theme_bw())
library(lubridate)
library(kableExtra)
library(cowplot)
library(knitr)
library("ggpubr")
library(reshape)
library(ggplot2)
# install.packages("ggmap")
library(ggmap)
# install.packages("maps")
library(maps)
# install.packages("mapdata")
library(mapdata)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(broom)
#library(cosore)
# rm(cosore)
# Source all needed functions
source('functions.R')
library(dunn.test)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(graticule)
library(rmapshaper)
library(grid)
library(scales)
library(RANN)
library(plotbiomes)
library(ggpubr)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggsci)        
library(ggdist)       
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(plspm)
library(randomForest)
library(factoextra)
```


## load data
```{r}
IGBP_koppen <- read.csv("data/IGBP_Koppen_MODIS.csv")
srdb_v4 <- read.csv(paste0(DATA_DIR,'/', 'srdbv4.csv'), header = T) # SRDB_V4 
srdb_v5 <- read.csv(paste0(DATA_DIR, '/', 'srdb_v5.csv'), header = T) # SRDB_V5

MGRsD <- read.csv(paste0(DATA_DIR,'/', "MGRsDAllData.csv"), header=T) # MGRsD data
DGRhRa <- read.csv(paste0(DATA_DIR,'/', "DGRhRa.csv"), header = T) # Daily time scale global Rh, Ra, and Q10 of Rh, Ra dataset

HGRsD <- read.csv(paste0(DATA_DIR,'/', "HGRsD_OriginalData.csv"), header = T) # Global hourly time scale Rs data
HGRsD$DN <- ifelse (is.na(HGRsD$TimeLable), 'NotA', ifelse(HGRsD$TimeLable >=7 & HGRsD$TimeLable <= 18, 'Day', 'Night'))   
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=8}
# test Q10 under Ra and Rh dominant sites
threshold <- 0.5

analyze_groups <- function(sdata, Q10_type, threshold = 0.5) {
  print(SEPARATOR)
  n_col <- colnames(sdata) == Q10_type
  sdata <- sdata[!is.na(sdata[, n_col]), ]
 sdata <- sdata[!is.na(sdata$RC_annual), ]
 sdata$Q10 <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(sdata[[Q10_type]]))
 sdata <- sdata[!is.na(sdata$Q10) & sdata$Q10 > 0, ]
  
  sdata$Ra_Rh_dom <- ifelse(sdata$RC_annual > threshold, 'Ra_dom', 'Rh_dom')
  n_Ra <- nrow(subset(sdata, sdata$Ra_Rh_dom == 'Ra_dom'))
  n_Rh <- nrow(subset(sdata, sdata$Ra_Rh_dom == 'Rh_dom'))
  
  print(paste0('**********normal-test**********', Q10_type))
  print(shapiro.test(sdata[sdata$Ra_Rh_dom == "Ra_dom", ]$Q10)) # test normality of Ra
  print(shapiro.test(sdata[sdata$Ra_Rh_dom == "Rh_dom", ]$Q10)) # test normality of Rh
  # test whether variance differ
  print(var.test(Q10 ~ Ra_Rh_dom, data = sdata))
  
  print(paste0('**********ANOVA**********'))
  anova <- aov(Q10 ~ Ra_Rh_dom, data = sdata)
  print (summary(anova))
  
  print(paste0('**********t-test**********'))
  t_t <- t.test(Q10 ~ Ra_Rh_dom, data = sdata, var.eq = TRUE)
  print(t_t) 
  
  print(paste0('**********wilcox-test**********'))
 wil <- wilcox.test(Q10 ~ Ra_Rh_dom, data = sdata, exact = FALSE)
 print(wil)
  pval <- wil$p.value
  sig  <- if      (pval < 0.001) "***"
          else if (pval < 0.01 ) "**"
          else if (pval < 0.05 ) "*"
          else                   "ns"
p_text  <- paste0("p = ", signif(pval, 2))
  
  # Set plot title dynamically based on Q10_type
suffix_map <- c(Q10_0_10  = "(a) 0–10°C", Q10_5_15  = "(b) 5–15°C", Q10_10_20 = "(c) 10–20°C",Q10_0_20  = "(d) 0–20°C")
plot_title <- suffix_map[Q10_type]
  
  # Create ggplot with dynamic title
p <- ggplot(sdata, aes(Q10, color = RC_annual > 0.5, fill = RC_annual > 0.5)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.25) +
  labs( x = expression(Q[10]^"Rs"),tag = plot_title ) +  
scale_fill_manual(
    name   = " ",
 breaks = c(FALSE, TRUE),   # FALSE → Ra/Rs ≤ threshold；TRUE → Ra/Rs > threshold
  labels = c(
    paste0("Ra/Rs \u2264 ", threshold, " (n=", n_Ra, ")"),
    paste0("Ra/Rs > ",  threshold, " (n=", n_Rh, ")") ),
  values = c("FALSE" = "skyblue", "TRUE" = "pink")) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name   = " ",
  breaks = c(FALSE, TRUE),
  labels = c(
    paste0("Ra/Rs \u2264 ", threshold, " (n=", n_Ra, ")"),
    paste0("Ra/Rs > ",  threshold, " (n=", n_Rh, ")")
  ),
  values = c("FALSE" = "skyblue", "TRUE" = "pink")) +
    annotate("text",x = 6, y = Inf, label = sig,
             hjust = 1.25, vjust = 1.5,size = 7, fontface = "bold",color = "red"
    ) +  theme(
    legend.position       = c(0.75, 0.65),
    legend.background     = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    legend.key            = element_blank(),
    plot.tag.position     = c(0.1, 0.99),
    plot.tag              = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 1, face = "bold", size = rel(1.1))
  )
  return(p)
}

# Plot density plots and arrange them in a grid
p_a <- analyze_groups(srdb_v4, 'Q10_0_10', threshold = 0.5) +labs(y = "Density") 
p_b <- analyze_groups(srdb_v4, 'Q10_5_15', threshold = 0.5) +labs(y = "Density") 
p_c <- analyze_groups(srdb_v4, 'Q10_10_20', threshold = 0.5) +labs(y = "Density")
p_d <- analyze_groups(srdb_v4, 'Q10_0_20', threshold = 0.5) +labs(y = "Density") 
theme_axes <- theme(
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 11),
  axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 11))
p_a <- p_a + theme(plot.tag.position = c(0.15, 0.98),plot.tag = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 1, face = "bold"),panel.grid.major = element_blank(),panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+theme_axes
p_b <- p_b + theme(plot.tag.position = c(0.15, 0.98),plot.tag = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 1, face = "bold"),panel.grid.major = element_blank(),panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+theme_axes
p_c <- p_c + theme( plot.tag.position = c(0.15, 0.98),plot.tag = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 1, face = "bold"),panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                   panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+theme_axes
p_d <- p_d + theme(plot.tag.position = c(0.15, 0.98),plot.tag = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 1, face = "bold"),panel.grid.major = element_blank(),panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+theme_axes
grid.arrange( p_a, p_b,p_c, p_d,ncol = 2)
```

```{r}
#Mean Q10Rs values are compared between sites below (blue) and above (pink) a moving RaRs threshold ranging from 0.30 to 0.60 in increments of 0.025.
boot_ci_mean <- function(x, B = 1000){
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  n <- length(x)
  if(n < 3) return(c(mean = NA, lwr = NA, upr = NA, n = n))

  boots <- replicate(B, mean(sample(x, size = n, replace = TRUE)))
  c(mean = mean(boots),
    lwr  = as.numeric(quantile(boots, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
    upr  = as.numeric(quantile(boots, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)),
    n    = n)
}
analyze_groups_threshold <- function(sdata, Q10_type,
                                     cuts = seq(0.30, 0.60, by = 0.025),
                                     B = 1000,
                                     min_n = 8){
  print(SEPARATOR)
  n_col <- colnames(sdata) == Q10_type
  sdata <- sdata[!is.na(sdata[, n_col]), ]
  sdata <- sdata[!is.na(sdata$RC_annual), ]
  sdata$Q10 <- sdata[, n_col]
  sdata <- sdata[sdata$Q10 > 0, ]

  suffix_map <- c(Q10_0_10  = "(e) 0–10°C",
                  Q10_5_15  = "(f) 5–15°C",
                  Q10_10_20 = "(g) 10–20°C",
                  Q10_0_20  = "(h) 0–20°C")
  plot_title <- suffix_map[Q10_type]
  res <- purrr::map_dfr(cuts, function(c0){
    sdata2 <- dplyr::as_tibble(sdata) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(group = ifelse(RC_annual > c0, "Ra/Rs > threshold", "Ra/Rs ≤ threshold"))
    out <- purrr::map_dfr(c("Ra/Rs > threshold","Ra/Rs ≤ threshold"), function(g){
      x <- sdata2$Q10[sdata2$group == g]
      n <- sum(!is.na(x))
      if(n < min_n){
        tibble::tibble(group = g, mean = NA, lwr = NA, upr = NA, n = n)
      } else {
        ci <- boot_ci_mean(x, B = B)
        tibble::tibble(group = g,
                       mean = ci["mean"], lwr = ci["lwr"], upr = ci["upr"], n = ci["n"])
      }
    })
    out %>% dplyr::mutate(cut = c0)
  })

  res$group <- factor(res$group, levels = c("Ra/Rs ≤ threshold", "Ra/Rs > threshold"))
  col_map <- c("Ra/Rs ≤ threshold" = "skyblue", "Ra/Rs > threshold" = "pink")

  ggplot(res, aes(x = cut, y = mean, color = group, fill = group)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), alpha = 0.25, color = NA, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(size = n), alpha = 0.85) +
    scale_color_manual(values = col_map, name = NULL) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = col_map, guide = "none") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Sample size (n)", range = c(1, 7)) +
    labs(x   = "Ra/Rs threshold", y   = expression(Q[10]^"Rs"), tag = plot_title ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.box = "horizontal",
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
      legend.key = element_blank(),
      plot.tag.position = c(0.1, 0.99),
      plot.tag = element_text(hjust = 0, vjust = 1, face = "bold", size = rel(1.1))
    )
}

theme_axes <- theme(
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 11),
  axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 11)
)

p_t1 <- analyze_groups_threshold(srdb_v4, "Q10_0_10", B = 1000, min_n = 8) + theme_axes + theme(plot.tag.position = c(0.20, 0.98), legend.position = "none")+ scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01))
p_t2 <- analyze_groups_threshold(srdb_v4, "Q10_5_15", B = 1000, min_n = 8) + theme_axes + theme(plot.tag.position = c(0.20, 0.98), legend.position = "none")+ scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01))
p_t3 <- analyze_groups_threshold(srdb_v4, "Q10_10_20", B = 1000, min_n = 8) + theme_axes + theme(plot.tag.position = c(0.20, 0.98), legend.position = "none")+ scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01))
p_t4 <- analyze_groups_threshold(srdb_v4, "Q10_0_20", B = 1000, min_n = 8) + theme_axes + theme(plot.tag.position = c(0.20, 0.98), legend.position = "none")+ scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01))

panel_2x2 <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p_t1, p_t2,
  p_t3, p_t4,
  ncol  = 2,
  align = "hv",
  axis  = "tblr"
)

leg_levels <- c("Ra/Rs ≤ threshold", "Ra/Rs > threshold")
col_map <- c("Ra/Rs ≤ threshold" = "skyblue", "Ra/Rs > threshold" = "pink")
n_breaks <- c(20, 50, 100)

leg_df <- tibble(group = factor(rep(leg_levels, each = length(n_breaks)), levels = leg_levels),n = rep(n_breaks, times = length(leg_levels)), x = 1, y = 1)

p_leg_strip <- ggplot(leg_df, aes(x, y, color = group, size = n)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0, show.legend = TRUE) +  
  scale_color_manual(values = col_map, name = NULL) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name   = "Sample size (n)",
    breaks = n_breaks,
    range  = c(2, 5.5)
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      order = 1,
      override.aes = list(alpha = 1, size = 5)
    ),
    size = guide_legend(
      order = 2,
      override.aes = list(alpha = 1, shape = 16)
    )
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.box       = "horizontal",
     legend.spacing.x = unit(40, "pt")
  )


final_plot <- cowplot::plot_grid(panel_2x2,
  p_leg_strip,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.06))
print(final_plot)
#ggsave("outputs/threshold.png", plot = final_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## prepare datasets
```{r}
#After filtering with different Q10_type (temperature), add the new column Q10_type to create a subset of the data frame.
filtration <- function (sdata, Q10_type, RC) {
  n_col <- colnames(sdata) == Q10_type
  n_RC <- colnames(sdata) == RC
  sdata <- sdata[!is.na(sdata[, n_col]), ]
  sdata <- sdata[!is.na(sdata[, n_RC]) & sdata[, n_RC] > 0, ]
  sdata <- subset(sdata, select=c("Record_number", "Study_number", "Longitude", "Latitude","YearsOfData","Species", "Biome", "Ecosystem_type", "Leaf_habit","Partition_method","R10", Q10_type, RC  ) )
  sdata$Q10_type <- Q10_type
  colnames(sdata) <- c( "Record_number", "Study_number","Longitude", "Latitude","YearsOfData", "Species", "Biome", "Ecosystem_type", "Leaf_habit","Partition_method",
                        "R10", "Q10", "RC_annual", "Q10_type" )
  
  return(sdata)
}
srdb_sub <- rbind(filtration (srdb_v4, 'Q10_0_10', 'RC_annual'),
                  filtration (srdb_v4, 'Q10_5_15', 'RC_annual'),
                  filtration (srdb_v4, 'Q10_10_20', 'RC_annual'),
                  filtration (srdb_v4, 'Q10_0_20', 'RC_annual'))
```

```{r}
q10_types <- c('Q10_0_10', 'Q10_5_15', 'Q10_10_20', 'Q10_0_20')

regression_results <- data.frame(
  Q10_type = character(),
  R2 = numeric(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  label = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

y_positions <- c(3.5, 3.3, 2.2, 2.0)  
for (i in seq_along(q10_types)) {
  type <- q10_types[i]
  filtered_data <- filtration(srdb_v4, type, 'RC_annual')
  
  if (nrow(filtered_data) > 0) {
    filtered_data$AR_SR <- filtered_data$RC_annual
    
    model <- lm(Q10 ~ AR_SR, data = filtered_data)
    model_summary <- summary(model)
    
    r_squared <- model_summary$r.squared
    p_value <- coef(summary(model))["AR_SR", "Pr(>|t|)"]
    
    label <- sprintf("%s\nR²=%.2f, p=%.3f\n", gsub(" ", "~", type), r_squared, p_value)
    
    regression_results <- rbind(
      regression_results,
      data.frame(
        Q10_type = type,
        R2 = r_squared,
        p_value = p_value,
        label = label,
        y_pos = y_positions[i],  
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("No data for Q10_type: %s\n", type))
  }
}

combined_data <- do.call(rbind, lapply(q10_types, function(type) filtration(srdb_v4, type, 'RC_annual')))
combined_data$AR_SR <- combined_data$RC_annual  

num_bins <- 10  
binned_data <- combined_data %>%
  mutate(AR_bin = cut(AR_SR, breaks = num_bins, include.lowest = TRUE)) %>%
  group_by(Q10_type, AR_bin) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    AR_mid = mean(AR_SR, na.rm = TRUE),  
    Q10_mean = mean(Q10, na.rm = TRUE),  
    Q10_se = sd(Q10, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),  
    count = n()  
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

y_positions_label <- c(3.0, 2.78, 2.46, 2.6)
y_positions_stats <- c(2.95 ,2.73, 2.41,  2.55)  
regression_results$label_expr <- c(
  "Q[10]~'(0–10 °C)'",
  "Q[10]~'(5–15 °C)'",
  "Q[10]~'(10–20 °C)'",
  "Q[10]~'(0–20 °C)'"
)
labels_data <- data.frame(
  Q10_type = regression_results$Q10_type,
  label = regression_results$label_expr,
  y_pos = y_positions_label
)

stats_data <- data.frame(
  Q10_type = regression_results$Q10_type,
label = c(
    sprintf("R^2==%.2f*','~italic(p)==0.05", regression_results$R2[1]),
    sprintf("R^2==%.2f*','~italic(p)<0.001", regression_results$R2[2]), 
    sprintf("R^2==%.2f*','~italic(p)<0.01", regression_results$R2[3]),  
    sprintf("R^2==%.2f*','~italic(p)<0.01", regression_results$R2[4])   
  ),
y_pos = y_positions_stats
)

RA_PLOT <- 
  ggplot(binned_data, aes(x = AR_mid, y = Q10_mean, color = Q10_type, size = count)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(data = combined_data, 
                aes(x = AR_SR, y = Q10, fill = Q10_type, color = Q10_type), # 映射回原始变量
                method = "lm", 
                se = TRUE, 
                linetype = "solid", 
                alpha = 0.35,size = 1.5 ) +
  xlim(0.24, 0.85)+ylim(2.4, 3.2) + 
  labs(x = "Ra/Rs", y  = expression(Q[10]^"Rs"), tag = "(a)" ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),  
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.tag.position  = c(0.15, 0.97), 
    plot.tag = element_text(face   = "bold", size   = rel(1.5) )) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Q10_0_10" = "#1d9bf7",
    "Q10_5_15" = "#35a153",
    "Q10_10_20" = "#f26a11",
    "Q10_0_20" = "#A6519E"
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
     "Q10_0_10" = "#C3E2EC",
    "Q10_5_15" = "#BCD1BC",
    "Q10_10_20" = "#F3DAC0",
    "Q10_0_20" = "#E3C6E0"
  ), guide = "none") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 8)) +

  geom_text(data = labels_data,
    aes(x = max(binned_data$AR_mid, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.72,y = y_pos,label = paste0("bold(", label, ")"),color = Q10_type),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,hjust = 0,size = 4.5,fontface = "bold",parse = TRUE) +

  geom_text(data = stats_data,
    aes(x = max(binned_data$AR_mid, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.72,y = y_pos,
      label = paste0("bold(", label, ")"),color = Q10_type),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,hjust = 0,size = 4,parse = TRUE)
RA_PLOT <- RA_PLOT+theme_axes
print(RA_PLOT)
#ggsave("outputs/AR_SR_binned_Q10_fitted2.png", plot = RA_PLOT, width = 6, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
y_positions_label <- c(3.15, 3.0, 2.55, 2.69)
y_positions_stats <- c(3.10, 2.95, 2.50, 2.64)

labels_data <- data.frame(
  Q10_type = regression_results$Q10_type,
  label = regression_results$label_expr,
  y_pos = y_positions_label,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

stats_data <- data.frame(
  Q10_type = regression_results$Q10_type,
  label = c(
    sprintf("R^2==%.2f*','~italic(p)==0.05",  regression_results$R2[1]),
    sprintf("R^2==%.2f*','~italic(p)<0.001", regression_results$R2[2]),
    sprintf("R^2==%.2f*','~italic(p)<0.01",  regression_results$R2[3]),
    sprintf("R^2==%.2f*','~italic(p)<0.01",  regression_results$R2[4])
  ),
  y_pos = y_positions_stats,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)


RA_PLOT_raw <-
  ggplot(combined_data, aes(x = AR_SR, y = Q10, color = Q10_type)) +
 geom_smooth(
    data = combined_data,
    aes(x = AR_SR, y = Q10, fill = Q10_type, color = Q10_type),
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    linetype = "solid",
    alpha = 0.35,
    linewidth = 1.5
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.55, size = 2) +  
  xlim(0.3, 0.7) + ylim(2.4, 3.2) +
  labs(x = "Ra/Rs", y = expression(Q[10]^"Rs")) +

  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.tag.position = c(0.12, 0.96),
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.5))
  ) +theme_axes+ 

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Q10_0_10"  = "#1d9bf7",
    "Q10_5_15"  = "#35a153",
    "Q10_10_20" = "#f26a11",
    "Q10_0_20"  = "#A6519E"
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Q10_0_10"  = "#C3E2EC",
    "Q10_5_15"  = "#BCD1BC",
    "Q10_10_20" = "#F3DAC0",
    "Q10_0_20"  = "#E3C6E0"
  ), guide = "none") +

  geom_text(
    data = labels_data,
    aes(
      x = 0.59,
      y = y_pos,
      label = label,
      color = Q10_type
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 4,
    #fontface = "bold",
    parse = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = stats_data,
    aes(
      x = 0.59,
      y = y_pos,
      label = label,
      color = Q10_type
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.6,
    parse = TRUE
  ) +
  theme_axes
print(RA_PLOT_raw)
#ggsave("outputs/AR_SR_binned_Q10_fitted2.png", plot = RA_PLOT_raw, width = 6.5, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- read.csv( "data/MGRsD_update_with_IGBP.csv")
shapiro_test <- shapiro.test(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_diff)
print(shapiro_test)
wilcox_test <- wilcox.test(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_diff, mu = 0, exact = FALSE)
print(wilcox_test)

ggplot(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, aes(y = Q10_diff)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Boxplot of Q10_diff",
       y = "Q10_diff",
       x = "") +
  theme_minimal()
median_Q10_diff <- median(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_diff, na.rm = TRUE)
ggplot(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, aes(x = Q10_diff)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.2, color = "black", fill = NA) +  # 设置无填充色
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", size = 1) +  # 中心参考线
  geom_vline(xintercept = median_Q10_diff, color = "black", size = 1) +  # 中位数线
  labs(title = "Histogram of Q10_diff",
       x = "Q10_diff",
       y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
shapiro_test_Ra <- shapiro.test(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra)
shapiro_test_Rh <- shapiro.test(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh)
wilcox_test <- wilcox.test(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra, Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh, paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE)
p_value <- signif(wilcox_test$p.value, 3)
print(wilcox_test)
t_test_result <- t.test(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra, Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh, paired = TRUE)

Ra_Rh <- data.frame(
  group = rep(c("Q10_Ra", "Q10_Rh"), each = nrow(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh)),
  value = c(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra, Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh)
)

group_stats <- Ra_Rh %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),                           
    mean_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),  
    max_value = max(value, na.rm = TRUE)    
  )

Ra_Rh_oaired_t <- ggplot(Ra_Rh, aes(x = group, y = value)) +
geom_boxplot(fill = "white", color = "black", width = 0.6, outlier.colour = "black") +
  labs(title = " ",
       x = "",
       y = "Q10") +
 scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, 6)) +  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#E5E5E5", size = 8.5),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "#E5E5E5"),
        plot.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA)) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 4, label = sprintf("p = %.4f ***", t_test_result$p.value), size = 10, color = "black")
print(Ra_Rh_oaired_t)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
n_bootstrap <- 5000

bootstrap_means_Ra <- replicate(n_bootstrap, {
  sample(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra, size = length(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra), replace = TRUE) %>%
    mean(na.rm = TRUE)
})

bootstrap_means_Rh <- replicate(n_bootstrap, {
  sample(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh, size = length(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh), replace = TRUE) %>%
    mean(na.rm = TRUE)
})

bootstrap_means_diff <- replicate(n_bootstrap, {
  sample(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_diff, size = length(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_diff), replace = TRUE) %>%
    mean(na.rm = TRUE)
})

bootstrap_density_all <- data.frame(
  Value = c(bootstrap_means_Ra, bootstrap_means_Rh, bootstrap_means_diff),
  Group = rep(c("Q10_Ra", "Q10_Rh", "Q10_diff"), each = n_bootstrap)
)

summary_lines <- bootstrap_density_all %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean = mean(Value),
    lower = quantile(Value, 0.025),
    upper = quantile(Value, 0.975),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(color = dplyr::case_when(
    Group == "Q10_Ra" ~ "red",
    Group == "Q10_Rh" ~ "blue",
    Group == "Q10_diff" ~ "black"
  ))

summary_lines <- summary_lines %>%
  mutate(signif_label = case_when(
    lower > 0 | upper < 0 ~ "***",  
    lower * upper > 0 ~ "*",        
    TRUE ~ "ns"                     
  ))
```


```{r}
bootstrap_diff_df <- bootstrap_density_all %>% filter(Group == "Q10_diff")
summary_diff <- summary_lines %>% filter(Group == "Q10_diff")

Bootstrap_diff_plot <- ggplot(bootstrap_diff_df, aes(x = Value)) +
  geom_density(fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = summary_diff$mean), linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = summary_diff$lower), linetype = "dotted", size = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = summary_diff$upper), linetype = "dotted", size = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "solid", size = 1) +
  geom_text(
    aes(x = 0.6, y = 3.5, label = summary_diff$signif_label),
    size = 6, vjust = -1.2,color = "red", fontface = "bold") +
  labs(x = expression(Q[10]^Diff ~ "Bootstrap Mean"),y = "Density" ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +    scale_y_continuous(position = "right")

print(Bootstrap_diff_plot)
```

```{r}
bootstrap_means_Ra <- replicate(n_bootstrap, {
  sample(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra,size = length(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra),replace = TRUE) %>% mean(na.rm = TRUE)})

bootstrap_means_Rh <- replicate(n_bootstrap, {sample(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh,size = length(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh),replace = TRUE) %>%
    mean(na.rm = TRUE)})

bootstrap_density_all <- data.frame(Value = c(bootstrap_means_Ra, bootstrap_means_Rh), Group = rep(c("Q10_Ra", "Q10_Rh"), each = n_bootstrap))

summary_lines <- bootstrap_density_all %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean  = mean(Value),lower = quantile(Value, 0.025),upper = quantile(Value, 0.975),.groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(color = dplyr::case_when(Group == "Q10_Ra" ~ "red", Group == "Q10_Rh" ~ "blue"))
Bootstrap_plot <- ggplot(bootstrap_density_all, aes(x = Value, fill = Group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, color = NA) +
  geom_vline(data = summary_lines,aes(xintercept = mean,  color = Group),linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(data = summary_lines,aes(xintercept = lower, color = Group),linetype = "dotted", size = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(data = summary_lines, aes(xintercept = upper, color = Group),linetype = "dotted", size = 0.5) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Q10_Ra" = "#F7C4C1", "Q10_Rh" = "#ADD9EE"), labels = c(expression(Q[10]^Ra), expression(Q[10]^Rh)), name   = "Group") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Q10_Ra" = "red", "Q10_Rh" = "blue"),labels = c(expression(Q[10]^Ra), expression(Q[10]^Rh)), name   = "Mean & 95% CI" ) +

  guides( fill = guide_legend( override.aes = list(shape = 22, size = 5, color = NULL),  title = NULL),
    color = guide_legend( override.aes = list(  linetype = "dashed",  size = 1.2 ),   title = "Mean & 95% CI")) +
  labs( x = "Bootstrap Mean", y = "Density") +
  scale_y_continuous(position = "left") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme( panel.grid = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1), legend.position = c(0.48, 0.6),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12),  legend.key.height = unit(30, "pt"))
Bootstrap_plot <- Bootstrap_plot+ theme_axes
print(Bootstrap_plot)
#ggsave("outputs/SUPfig2.png", plot = Bootstrap_plot, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- read.csv( "data/MGRsD_update_with_IGBP.csv")
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  filter(!is.na(IGBP))  
full_copy <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>% mutate(IGBP_group="ALL")

Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    IGBP_group = case_when(
      IGBP %in% c("DBF", "EBF", "ENF", "MF", "DNF") ~ "FOR",  
      IGBP %in% c("CSH", "CVM", "OSH") ~ "SH",             
      IGBP %in% c("GRA", "WSA") ~ "GRA",                        
      IGBP == "CRO" ~ "CRO",                       
      TRUE ~ NA_character_                          
    ))
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh  <- bind_rows(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, full_copy) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IGBP_group)) 

Q10_long <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  dplyr::select(IGBP_group, Q10_Ra, Q10_Rh) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Q10_Ra, Q10_Rh),
    names_to = "Type",
    values_to = "Q10"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Q10), is.finite(Q10))
  
Q10_plot_data2 <- Q10_long %>%
  dplyr::group_by(IGBP_group, Type) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_value = mean(Q10, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower_ci = quantile(Q10, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper_ci = quantile(Q10, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

sig_df <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  dplyr::group_by(IGBP_group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    p_value = ifelse(sum(!is.na(Q10_Ra) & !is.na(Q10_Rh)) > 1,
                     wilcox.test(Q10_Ra, Q10_Rh, paired = TRUE)$p.value,
                     NA_real_),
    n = sum(!is.na(Q10_Ra) & !is.na(Q10_Rh)),
    mean_Ra = mean(Q10_Ra, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Rh = mean(Q10_Rh, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_pos = max(c(Q10_Ra, Q10_Rh), na.rm = TRUE) + 0.7 # 星号y坐标
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    significance_label = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      p_value > 0.05 ~ " ",
      is.na(p_value) ~ "NA",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ),
 label_N_p = ifelse(is.na(p_value),"p=NA",
  ifelse( p_value < 0.001,"p<0.001",
    paste0("p=", sprintf("%.3f", p_value)))),
label_N_p = paste0(label_N_p, "\nN=", n))


library(gghalves)
library(ggbeeswarm)

Q10_long$IGBP_group_num <- as.numeric(factor(Q10_long$IGBP_group, levels = c("ALL","CRO","FOR","GRA","SH")))

offset <- 0.16

IGBP_VIO2 <- ggplot(Q10_long, aes(x = IGBP_group, y = Q10)) +
  gghalves::geom_half_violin(
    data = subset(Q10_long, Type == "Q10_Ra"),
    aes(x = IGBP_group, y = Q10),
    side = "l",
    fill = "pink", color = NA, alpha = 0.35, width = 0.9,
     position = position_nudge(x = -offset)
  ) +
  gghalves::geom_half_violin(
    data = subset(Q10_long, Type == "Q10_Rh"),
    aes(x = IGBP_group, y = Q10),
    side = "r",
    fill = "skyblue", color = NA, alpha = 0.35, width = 0.9,
    position = position_nudge(x = offset)
  ) +
  geom_quasirandom(
    data = subset(Q10_long, Type == "Q10_Ra"),
    aes(x = IGBP_group_num - offset, y = Q10, fill = Type),
    color = "red",
    width = 0.13, size = 1.4, alpha = 0.8, shape = 21, show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_quasirandom(
    data = subset(Q10_long, Type == "Q10_Rh"),
    aes(x = IGBP_group_num + offset, y = Q10, fill = Type),
    color = "blue",
    width = 0.13, size = 1.4, alpha = 0.8, shape = 21, show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
  data = subset(Q10_long, Type == "Q10_Ra"),
  aes(x = IGBP_group, y = Q10),
  width = 0.10,            
  side = "l",color = "red", fill = "pink", alpha = 0.8,
  outlier.shape = NA, position = position_nudge(x = -offset)) +
   geom_boxplot(
    data = subset(Q10_long, Type == "Q10_Rh"),
    aes(x = IGBP_group, y = Q10),
     width = 0.10, 
    side = "r", fill = "skyblue", color = "blue", outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8,
    position = position_nudge(x = offset)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = expression(bold(Q[10]))
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "bottom") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(Q10_Ra = "pink", Q10_Rh = "skyblue"),
    labels = c(Q10_Ra = expression(Q[10]^"Ra"),
               Q10_Rh = expression(Q[10]^"Rh")),
    name   = NULL,
    breaks = c("Q10_Ra", "Q10_Rh")
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      direction   = "horizontal",
      override.aes = list(shape = 21, size = 4, alpha  = 0.6, colour = NA, alpha = 1)
    )
  ) + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.5, 11.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12), 
    legend.position = c(0.85, 0.78) 
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = sig_df,
    aes(x = IGBP_group, y = 11.45, label = significance_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 9, color = "red"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = sig_df,
    aes(x = IGBP_group, y = 10.9, label = label_N_p),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 4, hjust = 0.5, color = "black"
  )+ scale_x_discrete(
    limits = c("ALL","CRO","FOR","GRA","SH"), 
    labels = c(ALL = "All",
               CRO = "Cropland",
               FOR = "Forest",
               GRA = "Grassland",
               SH  = "Shrubland")
  )
print(IGBP_VIO2)
#ggsave("outputs/Q10_diff_IGBP3.jpg", plot = IGBP_VIO2, width = 8.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)  
n_bootstrap <- 5000 

perform_bootstrap <- function(data, group_name) {
  bootstrap_means <- replicate(
    n_bootstrap,
    mean(sample(data$Q10_diff, size = nrow(data), replace = TRUE), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
  mean_value <- mean(bootstrap_means)  
  lower_ci <- quantile(bootstrap_means, probs = 0.025)  
  upper_ci <- quantile(bootstrap_means, probs = 0.975)  
  data.frame(
    IGBP_group = group_name,
    mean_value = mean_value,
    lower_ci = lower_ci,
    upper_ci = upper_ci,
    bootstrap_mean = bootstrap_means  
  )
}
bootstrap_results <- list()
for (group in unique(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$IGBP_group)) {
  group_data <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>% filter(IGBP_group == group)
  bootstrap_results[[group]] <- perform_bootstrap(group_data, group)
}
bootstrap_summary <- do.call(rbind, bootstrap_results)
library(ggridges)  
library(viridis)   
bootstrap_summary$IGBP_group <- factor(
  bootstrap_summary$IGBP_group,
  levels = c("CRO","SH","FOR","GRA","ALL")
)
bootstrap_ecosystems <- ggplot(bootstrap_summary, aes(x = bootstrap_mean,y = IGBP_group,fill = ..x..)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "gray", linetype = "dashed", size = 1.5) +
  geom_density_ridges_gradient(scale = 3,rel_min_height = 0.01,gradient_lwd = 1.0, color = "white") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0.01, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0.01, 0), position = "right") +
  scale_fill_viridis(name = NULL, option = "D") +
  labs(
    x = expression(bold("Bootstrap Mean of ") * Q[10]^Diff),
    y = NULL) +
  theme_ridges(font_size = 13, grid = FALSE) + 
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.border     = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1, fill = NA),
    axis.title.x     = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = c(0.75, 0.5),
    plot.background  = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),  
    theme_axes)
print(bootstrap_ecosystems)
#ggsave("outputs/Q10_diffBOOTSTRAP_IGBP.jpg", plot = bootstrap_ecosystems, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
n_bootstrap <- 5000

perform_bootstrap_col <- function(df, col, grp, type){
  v <- df[[col]]
  v <- v[is.finite(v) & !is.na(v)]
  if(length(v) < 2) return(data.frame(IGBP_group=grp, Type=type, bootstrap_mean=numeric(0)))
  data.frame(
    IGBP_group = grp,
    Type = type,
    bootstrap_mean = replicate(n_bootstrap, mean(sample(v, length(v), replace = TRUE)))
  )
}

igbp_levels <- c("ALL","CRO","FOR","GRA","SH")
boot_list <- lapply(igbp_levels, function(g){
  gdat <- dplyr::filter(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, IGBP_group == g)
  rbind(
    perform_bootstrap_col(gdat, "Q10_Ra", g, "Q10_Ra"),
    perform_bootstrap_col(gdat, "Q10_Rh", g, "Q10_Rh")
  )
})
bootstrap_summary <- do.call(rbind, boot_list) %>%
  mutate(IGBP_group = factor(IGBP_group, levels = igbp_levels))

set.seed(123)
n_bootstrap <- 5000
perform_bootstrap_col <- function(df, col, grp, type) {
  v <- df[[col]]
  v <- v[is.finite(v) & !is.na(v)]
  if (length(v) < 1) {
    return(data.frame(
      IGBP_group = grp, Type = type, bootstrap_mean = numeric(0)
    ))
  }
  data.frame(
    IGBP_group   = grp,
    Type         = type,
    bootstrap_mean = replicate(n_bootstrap, mean(sample(v, length(v), replace = TRUE)))
  )
}

groups <- igbp_levels
boot_list <- lapply(groups, function(g){
  gdat <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>% filter(IGBP_group == g)
  rbind(
    perform_bootstrap_col(gdat, "Q10_Ra", g, "Q10_Ra"),
    perform_bootstrap_col(gdat, "Q10_Rh", g, "Q10_Rh")
  )
})
bootstrap_summary <- do.call(rbind, boot_list) %>%
  mutate(IGBP_group = factor(IGBP_group, levels = igbp_levels))

ci_df <- bootstrap_summary %>%
  dplyr::group_by(IGBP_group, Type) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    lower_ci = quantile(bootstrap_mean, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper_ci = quantile(bootstrap_mean, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_val = mean(bootstrap_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
igbp_levels <- unique(ci_df$IGBP_group)  
offset_pt <- 0.12

bs <- bootstrap_summary |>
  dplyr::mutate(IGBP_group = factor(IGBP_group, levels = igbp_levels))

ci_pos <- ci_df |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    IGBP_group = factor(IGBP_group, levels = igbp_levels),
    xnum = as.numeric(IGBP_group),
    xpos = ifelse(Type == "Q10_Ra", xnum - offset_pt, xnum + offset_pt)
  )

p_violin <- ggplot() +
  gghalves::geom_half_violin(
    data = dplyr::filter(bs, Type == "Q10_Ra"),
    aes(x = IGBP_group, y = bootstrap_mean),
    side = "l", width = 0.9,
    fill = "pink", color = "red", alpha = 0.6, trim = TRUE, adjust = 0.8
  ) +
  gghalves::geom_half_violin(
    data = dplyr::filter(bs, Type == "Q10_Rh"),
    aes(x = IGBP_group, y = bootstrap_mean),
    side = "r", width = 0.9,
    fill = "skyblue", color = "blue", alpha = 0.6, trim = TRUE, adjust = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = ci_pos,
    aes(x = xpos, y = mean_val, fill = Type),
    shape = 21, size = 2.8, stroke = 0.6, color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
      values = c(Q10_Ra = "red", Q10_Rh = "blue"), 
      name = NULL,
      labels = c(
          Q10_Ra = expression(Q[10]^"Ra"),
          Q10_Rh = expression(Q[10]^"Rh")
      )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
      values  = c(Q10_Ra = "pink", Q10_Rh = "skyblue"), 
      name = NULL,
      labels = c(
          Q10_Ra = expression(Q[10]^"Ra"),
          Q10_Rh = expression(Q[10]^"Rh")
      )
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = expression(bold("Bootstrap mean of ") * Q[10])) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    panel.border       = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.9),
    legend.position      = c(0.5, 0.9),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12,face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13,face = "bold")

  )+ scale_x_discrete(
    limits = c("ALL","CRO","FOR","GRA","SH"),        
    labels = c(ALL = "All",
               CRO = "Cropland",
               FOR = "Forest",
               GRA = "Grassland",
               SH  = "Shrubland")
  )
print(p_violin)
#ggsave("outputs/Q10_rarhBOOTSTRAP_VIO_2.jpg", plot = p_violin, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```

#PCA    For preparing the data to be used in PCA and PLSPM, the pca_data can be found in the last section of this RMD. Connect to the external database, corresponding to the latitude and longitude of the sites, and retrieve the data.
```{r}
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- read.csv("data/pca_data.csv")
pca_data <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  dplyr::select(CLY, CEC, PHIKCL, BD, ORC, cec_clay_rati, C_N_rati ,et0_resampled, prec_mean, temp_mean, ai_resampled, EcM, pred_avg,AGB, BGB, GPP, EVI, N_DEC, ALd, ALo, ALp, Fed, Feo, Fep, OC_Fe)  
pca_data_clean <- na.omit(pca_data)

pca_input <- scale(pca_data_clean ) 
pca_result <- prcomp(pca_input, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
summary(pca_result)

pca_plot <- fviz_pca_biplot(
  pca_result, 
  geom.ind = "point",
  #habillage = pca_data_clean$group, 
  #palette = c("skyblue", "tomato", "green"), 
  #addEllipses = TRUE,  
  label = "var", 
  repel = TRUE
) + 
  labs(title = "PCA of Soil Properties Related to Q10_Ra and Q10_Rh Groups") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12) )
print(pca_plot)

loadings <- pca_result$rotation
print(loadings)

fviz_contrib(pca_result, choice = "var", axes = 1, top = 10)  
fviz_contrib(pca_result, choice = "var", axes = 2, top = 10)  
```

#Random forest+PLSPM
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- read.csv("data/pca_data.csv")
pca_data <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  dplyr::select(CLY, SLT, CEC, PHIKCL, BD, ORC, clay_temp_ratio, cec_clay_rati, C_N_rati, prec_mean, temp_mean, ai_resampled, et0_resampled, AM, EcM, ErM, NM, nitrogen_avg, pred_avg, MAOC, POC, AGB, BGB, GPP, EVI, N_DEC,ALd, ALo, ALp, Fed, Feo, Fep, OC_Fe, Q10_Ra, Q10_Rh, IGBP_group)
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh_clean <- na.omit(pca_data)

pca_input_scaled <- scale(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh_clean %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(Q10_Ra, Q10_Rh,IGBP_group)))

pca_input <- scale(pca_data_clean ) 
pca_result <- prcomp(pca_input, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
summary(pca_result)

pca_input <- data.frame(
  pca_input_scaled, 
  Q10_Ra = Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh_clean$Q10_Ra,
  Q10_Rh = Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh_clean$Q10_Rh)


set.seed(123)  
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Ra ~ ., data = pca_input, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Rh ~ ., data = pca_input, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
importance_scores <- importance(rf_model)

print(importance_scores)
importance_scores_sorted2 <- importance_scores[order(-importance_scores[,"%IncMSE"], 
                                                    -importance_scores[,"IncNodePurity"]), ]
print(importance_scores_sorted2)
```

```{r}
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- read.csv("data/pca_data.csv")
theme_axes <- theme(
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
  axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 12))

Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  filter(IGBP != "BSV") %>% 
  mutate(
    IGBP_group = case_when(
      IGBP %in% c("DBF", "EBF", "ENF", "MF") ~ "FOR",  
      IGBP %in% c("CSH", "CVM", "OSH") ~ "SH",             
      IGBP %in% c("GRA", "WSA") ~ "GRA",                       
      IGBP == "CRO" ~ "CRO",                      
      TRUE ~ NA_character_                         
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IGBP_group)) 

pca_data <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  dplyr::select(CLY, SLT, CEC, PHIKCL, BD, ORC, clay_temp_ratio, cec_clay_rati, C_N_rati, prec_mean, temp_mean, ai_resampled, et0_resampled, AM, EcM, ErM, NM, nitrogen_avg, pred_avg, MAOC, POC, AGB, BGB, GPP, EVI, N_DEC, Q10_Ra, Q10_Rh, IGBP_group)
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh_clean <- na.omit(pca_data)

pca_input_scaled <- scale(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh_clean %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(Q10_Ra, Q10_Rh,IGBP_group)))

pca_input <- data.frame(
  pca_input_scaled, 
  Q10_Ra = Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh_clean$Q10_Ra,
  Q10_Rh = Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh_clean$Q10_Rh,
  IGBP_group = Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh_clean$IGBP_group  
)
SH_data <- pca_input %>%
  filter(IGBP_group == "SH")
FOR_data <- pca_input %>%
  filter(IGBP_group == "FOR")
GRA_data <- pca_input %>%
  filter(IGBP_group == "GRA")
CRO_data <- pca_input %>%
  filter(IGBP_group == "CRO")
```

```{R}
#SH_Q10_ra------------------------------------------------------------------
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Ra ~ ., data = SH_data, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Rh ~ ., data = SH_data, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
importance_scores <- importance(rf_model)
print(importance_scores)

selected_vars <- c("EVI", "C_N_rati", "Q10_Ra","BD","ORC", "nitrogen_avg")
SH_selected <- SH_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(selected_vars), Q10_Ra)  

comdata <- list(
  Soil  = c("BD" ), 
  Nutrient  = c("C_N_rati","ORC" ),
  Vegetation  = c("EVI"), 
  Q10_Ra    = c("Q10_Ra") 
)
latent_vars <- names(comdata)
dat_path <- matrix(0, nrow = length(latent_vars), ncol = length(latent_vars),
                   dimnames = list(latent_vars, latent_vars))
dat_path["Q10_Ra", c( "Soil","Nutrient","Vegetation")] <- 1
print(dat_path)
dat_modes <- c("A","A","A", "A")
pls_model <- plspm(SH_selected, dat_path, comdata, modes = dat_modes)
summary(pls_model)

pls_model_boot <- plspm(SH_selected, dat_path, comdata, modes = dat_modes,boot.val = TRUE,br = 500)  
summary(pls_model_boot)
print(pls_model_boot$gof)
plot(pls_model_boot)

effects_df_split <- pls_model_boot$effects %>%
  separate(relationships, into = c("cause", "response"), sep = " -> ")
q10_effects <- effects_df_split %>%
  filter(response == "Q10_Ra") %>%
  dplyr::select(cause, direct, indirect, total) %>%
  dplyr::rename(relationships = cause)
trad_effects_long <- pivot_longer(q10_effects,
                                   cols = c("direct", "indirect", "total"),
                                   names_to = "effect_type",
                                   values_to = "effect_size")
c1 <- ggplot(trad_effects_long, aes(x = relationships, y = effect_size, fill = effect_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = NULL,y = "Standardized Effect" ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "direct" = "#008CB7",
      "indirect" = "#A5C98C",
      "total" = "#FFBD00"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "direct" = "Direct Effect",
      "indirect" = "Indirect Effect",
      "total" = "Total Effect"
    )
  ) +
theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "plain")
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", size = 0.5)+ 
  ylim(-1, 1)
print(c1)

#SH_Q10_rh---------------------------------------------------
selected_vars <- c("nitrogen_avg","GPP","EVI", "Q10_Rh", "CEC", "cec_clay_rati","CLY","BGB","AM","NM")
SH_selected <- SH_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(selected_vars), Q10_Rh)  

comdata <- list(
  Nutrient  = c("nitrogen_avg" ),
  Microbial    = c("BGB","NM"),  
  Mineral = c("CEC"), 
  Q10_Rh       = c("Q10_Rh")  
)
latent_vars <- names(comdata)
dat_path <- matrix(0, nrow = length(latent_vars), ncol = length(latent_vars),
                   dimnames = list(latent_vars, latent_vars))
dat_path["Q10_Rh", c( "Nutrient","Microbial","Mineral")] <- 1
print(dat_path)
dat_modes <- c("A","A","A", "B")
pls_model <- plspm(SH_selected, dat_path, comdata, modes = dat_modes)
summary(pls_model)

pls_model_boot <- plspm(SH_selected, dat_path, comdata, 
                        modes = dat_modes,
                        boot.val = TRUE,
                        br = 500)  
summary(pls_model_boot)
print(pls_model_boot$gof)
plot(pls_model_boot)

effects_df_split <- pls_model_boot$effects %>%
  separate(relationships, into = c("cause", "response"), sep = " -> ")
q10_effects <- effects_df_split %>%
  filter(response == "Q10_Rh") %>%
  dplyr::select(cause, direct, indirect, total) %>%
  dplyr::rename(relationships = cause)
trad_effects_long <- pivot_longer(q10_effects,
                                   cols = c("direct", "indirect", "total"),
                                   names_to = "effect_type",
                                   values_to = "effect_size")
c2 <- ggplot(trad_effects_long, aes(x = relationships, y = effect_size, fill = effect_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = NULL,y = "Standardized Effect"  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "direct" = "#008CB7",
      "indirect" = "#A5C98C",
      "total" = "#FFBD00"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "direct" = "Direct Effect",
      "indirect" = "Indirect Effect",
      "total" = "Total Effect"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(position = "right", limits = c(-1, 1)) +
theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "plain")
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", size = 0.5) 
print(c2)
```


```{r}
#FOR_Q10_Ra-------------------------------------------------------------------
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Ra ~ ., data = FOR_data, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Rh ~ ., data = FOR_data, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
importance_scores <- importance(rf_model)
print(importance_scores)

selected_vars <- c( "temp_mean","et0_resampled","ai_resampled", "N_DEC","nitrogen_avg", "PHIKCL", "BD", "ORC","C_N_rati", "AGB","BGB","EVI","GPP","CEC" , "clay_temp_ratio","cec_clay_rati" ,"CLY","Q10_Ra","AM","EcM","ErM","pred_avg","POC","prec_mean")
FOR_selected <- FOR_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(selected_vars), Q10_Ra) 
comdata <- list(
  Soil  = c("BD"),  
  N_Dep = c("N_DEC"),
  Nutrient  = c("ORC","nitrogen_avg"),  
  pH    = c("PHIKCL"),
  Vegetation = c("AGB"),
  Q10_Ra   = c("Q10_Ra")  
)
latent_vars <- names(comdata)
dat_path <- matrix(0, nrow = length(latent_vars), ncol = length(latent_vars),
                   dimnames = list(latent_vars, latent_vars))
dat_path["Vegetation", c("Nutrient")] <- 1  
dat_path["Q10_Ra", c("N_Dep","Soil","Vegetation","pH")] <- 1
print(dat_path)
dat_modes <- c("A","A","A","A","A","A", "B")
pls_model <- plspm(FOR_selected, dat_path, comdata, modes = dat_modes)
summary(pls_model)


pls_model_boot <- plspm(FOR_selected, dat_path, comdata, 
                        modes = dat_modes,
                        boot.val = TRUE,
                        br = 500) 
summary(pls_model_boot)
print(pls_model_boot$gof)
plot(pls_model_boot)

effects_df_split <- pls_model_boot$effects %>%
  separate(relationships, into = c("cause", "response"), sep = " -> ")
q10_effects <- effects_df_split %>%
  filter(response == "Q10_Ra") %>%
  dplyr::select(cause, direct, indirect, total) %>%
  dplyr::rename(relationships = cause)
trad_effects_long <- pivot_longer(q10_effects,
                                   cols = c("direct", "indirect", "total"),
                                   names_to = "effect_type",
                                   values_to = "effect_size")
b1 <- ggplot(trad_effects_long, aes(x = relationships, y = effect_size, fill = effect_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs( x = NULL,y = "Standardized Effect" ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "direct" = "#008CB7",
      "indirect" = "#A5C98C",
      "total" = "#FFBD00"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "direct" = "Direct Effect",
      "indirect" = "Indirect Effect",
      "total" = "Total Effect"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(position = "left", limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none", 
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", size = 0.5)
print(b1)

#FOR_Q10_Rh--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
selected_vars <- c("ai_resampled","prec_mean","N_DEC","nitrogen_avg", "Q10_Rh","BD",  "CEC","cec_clay_rati","Feo","CLY","N_DEC","ErM","AM","NM","pred_avg","MAOC")
FOR_selected <- FOR_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(selected_vars), Q10_Rh)  
comdata <- list(
  #Climate = c("ai_resampled","prec_mean"), 
  N_Dep   = c("N_DEC"), 
  #Nutrient =c("nitrogen_avg"),
  Soil = c("BD"),  
  Microbial  = c("AM"),  
  Mineral = c("CEC","Feo"), 
  Q10_Rh   = c("Q10_Rh")  
)
latent_vars <- names(comdata)
dat_path <- matrix(0, nrow = length(latent_vars), ncol = length(latent_vars),
                   dimnames = list(latent_vars, latent_vars))
dat_path["Mineral", c("Soil")] <- 1
dat_path["Q10_Rh", c("N_Dep","Microbial", "Mineral")] <- 1
print(dat_path)
dat_modes <- c("A","A","A","A","A","A","B")
pls_model <- plspm(FOR_selected, dat_path, comdata, modes = dat_modes)
summary(pls_model)

pls_model_boot <- plspm(FOR_selected, dat_path, comdata, 
                        modes = dat_modes,
                        boot.val = TRUE,
                        br = 500)  
summary(pls_model_boot)
print(pls_model_boot$gof)
plot(pls_model_boot)

effects_df_split <- pls_model_boot$effects %>%
  separate(relationships, into = c("cause", "response"), sep = " -> ")
q10_effects <- effects_df_split %>%
  filter(response == "Q10_Rh") %>%
  dplyr::select(cause, direct, indirect, total) %>%
  dplyr::rename(relationships = cause)
trad_effects_long <- pivot_longer(q10_effects,
                                   cols = c("direct", "indirect", "total"),
                                   names_to = "effect_type",
                                   values_to = "effect_size")
b2 <- ggplot(trad_effects_long, aes(x = relationships, y = effect_size, fill = effect_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = NULL,y = "Standardized Effect") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "direct" = "#008CB7",
      "indirect" = "#A5C98C",
      "total" = "#FFBD00"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "direct" = "Direct Effect",
      "indirect" = "Indirect Effect",
      "total" = "Total Effect"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(position = "right", limits = c(-1, 1)) +
theme_bw() +  
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", size = 0.5)
print(b2)
```


```{r}
#GRA_Q10_Ra------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Ra ~ ., data = GRA_data, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Rh ~ ., data = GRA_data, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
importance_scores <- importance(rf_model)
print(importance_scores)

selected_vars <- c( "ORC","AGB", "BGB","CLY","EVI", "GPP","BD","CEC","POC", "clay_temp_ratio","MAOC", "cec_clay_rati","C_N_rati","nitrogen_avg","temp_mean", "prec_mean","et0_resampled", "pred_avg","Q10_Ra")
GRA_selected <- GRA_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(selected_vars), Q10_Ra)  

comdata <- list(
  Climate = c("temp_mean"), 
  Nutrient  = c("ORC","nitrogen_avg"),  
  Soil = c("CLY"),
  Vegetation   = c("GPP"), 
  Q10_Ra   = c("Q10_Ra")  
)
latent_vars <- names(comdata)
dat_path <- matrix(0, nrow = length(latent_vars), ncol = length(latent_vars),
                   dimnames = list(latent_vars, latent_vars))
dat_path["Q10_Ra", c("Climate", "Vegetation","Nutrient","Soil")] <- 1
print(dat_path)
dat_modes <- c("A","A","A","A","A","B")
pls_model <- plspm(GRA_selected, dat_path, comdata, modes = dat_modes)
summary(pls_model)

pls_model_boot <- plspm(GRA_selected, dat_path, comdata, 
                        modes = dat_modes,
                        boot.val = TRUE,
                        br = 500)  
summary(pls_model_boot)
print(pls_model_boot$gof)
plot(pls_model_boot)

effects_df_split <- pls_model_boot$effects %>%
  separate(relationships, into = c("cause", "response"), sep = " -> ")
q10_effects <- effects_df_split %>%
  filter(response == "Q10_Ra") %>%
  dplyr::select(cause, direct, indirect, total) %>%
  dplyr::rename(relationships = cause)
trad_effects_long <- pivot_longer(q10_effects,
                                   cols = c("direct", "indirect", "total"),
                                   names_to = "effect_type",
                                   values_to = "effect_size")
a1 <- ggplot(trad_effects_long, aes(x = relationships, y = effect_size, fill = effect_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = NULL,y = "Standardized Effect") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "direct" = "#008CB7",
      "indirect" = "#A5C98C",
      "total" = "#FFBD00"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "direct" = "Direct Effect",
      "indirect" = "Indirect Effect",
      "total" = "Total Effect"
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme_axes +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  ylim(-1, 1)+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.title = element_blank(), 
    legend.position = c(0.05, 0.90),  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.justification = c("left", "top"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
print(a1)
#GRA_Q10_Rh----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
selected_vars <- c("ORC","nitrogen_avg", "BGB","et0_resampled", "ALp", "cec_clay_rati","Q10_Rh" )
GRA_selected <- GRA_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(selected_vars), Q10_Rh)
comdata <- list(
 Nutrient  = c("ORC","nitrogen_avg"),  
  Climate  = c("et0_resampled"), 
   Microbial =c("BGB"), 
  Mineral  = c("ALp"),
  Q10_Rh   = c("Q10_Rh")  
)
latent_vars <- names(comdata)
dat_path <- matrix(0, nrow = length(latent_vars), ncol = length(latent_vars),
                   dimnames = list(latent_vars, latent_vars))
dat_path["Microbial", c("Nutrient")] <- 1
dat_path["Q10_Rh", c("Mineral","Climate", "Microbial")] <- 1
print(dat_path)
dat_modes <- c("A", "A","A","A", "A", "A", "B")
pls_model <- plspm(GRA_selected, dat_path, comdata, modes = dat_modes)
summary(pls_model)


pls_model_boot <- plspm(GRA_selected, dat_path, comdata, 
                        modes = dat_modes,
                        boot.val = TRUE,
                        br = 500)  
summary(pls_model_boot)
print(pls_model_boot$gof)
plot(pls_model_boot)

effects_df_split <- pls_model_boot$effects %>%
  separate(relationships, into = c("cause", "response"), sep = " -> ")
q10_effects <- effects_df_split %>%
  filter(response == "Q10_Rh") %>%
  dplyr::select(cause, direct, indirect, total) %>%
  dplyr::rename(relationships = cause)
trad_effects_long <- pivot_longer(q10_effects,
                                   cols = c("direct", "indirect", "total"),
                                   names_to = "effect_type",
                                   values_to = "effect_size")
a2 <- ggplot(trad_effects_long, aes(x = relationships, y = effect_size, fill = effect_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = NULL,y = "Standardized Effect") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "direct" = "#008CB7",
      "indirect" = "#A5C98C",
      "total" = "#FFBD00"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "direct" = "Direct Effect",
      "indirect" = "Indirect Effect",
      "total" = "Total Effect"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(position = "right", limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none", 
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", size = 0.5)
print(a2)
```

```{r}
#CRO_Q10_Ra----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Ra ~ ., data = CRO_data, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
rf_model <- randomForest(Q10_Rh ~ ., data = CRO_data, importance = TRUE, ntree = 500)
importance_scores <- importance(rf_model)
print(importance_scores)

selected_vars <- c("ORC","EVI","pred_avg","nitrogen_avg", "AGB", "BGB","GPP", "BD","PHIKCL","CLY","SLT","et0_resampled", "temp_mean", "prec_mean", "POC","MAOC", "CEC",  "clay_temp_ratio", "cec_clay_rati", "N_DEC",  "N_DEC", "C_N_rati","Q10_Ra" )
CRO_selected <- CRO_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(selected_vars), Q10_Ra)  
comdata <- list(
  Climate = c("temp_mean"), 
  N_Dep =c("N_DEC"),  
  Nutrient = c("POC","nitrogen_avg"),
  Vegetation= c("EVI"),
  Q10_Ra   = c("Q10_Ra")  
)
latent_vars <- names(comdata)
dat_path <- matrix(0, nrow = length(latent_vars), ncol = length(latent_vars),
                   dimnames = list(latent_vars, latent_vars))
dat_path["Vegetation", c("N_Dep")] <- 1
dat_path["Vegetation", c("Nutrient")] <- 1
dat_path["Q10_Ra", c("Climate", "Vegetation")] <- 1
print(dat_path)
dat_modes <- c("A", "A","A","A", "A", "B")
pls_model <- plspm(CRO_selected, dat_path, comdata, modes = dat_modes)
summary(pls_model)

pls_model_boot <- plspm(CRO_selected, dat_path, comdata, 
                        modes = dat_modes,
                        boot.val = TRUE,
                        br = 500)   
summary(pls_model_boot)
print(pls_model_boot$gof)
plot(pls_model_boot)

effects_df_split <- pls_model_boot$effects %>%
  separate(relationships, into = c("cause", "response"), sep = " -> ")
q10_effects <- effects_df_split %>%
  filter(response == "Q10_Ra") %>%
  dplyr::select(cause, direct, indirect, total) %>%
  dplyr::rename(relationships = cause)
trad_effects_long <- pivot_longer(q10_effects,
                                   cols = c("direct", "indirect", "total"),
                                   names_to = "effect_type",
                                   values_to = "effect_size")
d1 <- ggplot(trad_effects_long, aes(x = relationships, y = effect_size, fill = effect_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = NULL,y = "Standardized Effect") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "direct" = "#008CB7",
      "indirect" = "#A5C98C",
      "total" = "#FFBD00"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "direct" = "Direct Effect",
      "indirect" = "Indirect Effect",
      "total" = "Total Effect"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(position = "left", limits = c(-1, 1)) +
 theme_bw() + 
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", size = 0.5) 
print(d1)

#CRO_Q10_Rh----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
selected_vars <- c("ORC","nitrogen_avg", "BGB", "temp_mean", "CEC",  "clay_temp_ratio", "cec_clay_rati",  "Fep","Q10_Rh" )

CRO_selected <- CRO_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(selected_vars), Q10_Rh)  
comdata <- list(
  Climate = c("temp_mean"), 
    Mineral = c("CEC","Fep"),  
Nutrient  = c("ORC","nitrogen_avg"),  
  Microbial =c("BGB"),
  Q10_Rh   = c("Q10_Rh")  
)
latent_vars <- names(comdata)
dat_path <- matrix(0, nrow = length(latent_vars), ncol = length(latent_vars),
                   dimnames = list(latent_vars, latent_vars))
dat_path["Nutrient", c("Mineral")] <- 1
dat_path["Q10_Rh", c("Climate","Microbial", "Mineral","Nutrient")] <- 1
print("路径矩阵:")
print(dat_path)
dat_modes <- c("A","A", "A","A", "A","B")
pls_model_boot <- plspm(CRO_selected, dat_path, comdata, 
                        modes = dat_modes,
                        boot.val = TRUE,
                        br = 500)   
summary(pls_model_boot)
print(pls_model_boot$gof)
plot(pls_model_boot)

effects_df_split <- pls_model_boot$effects %>%
  separate(relationships, into = c("cause", "response"), sep = " -> ")
q10_effects <- effects_df_split %>%
  filter(response == "Q10_Rh") %>%
  dplyr::select(cause, direct, indirect, total) %>%
  dplyr::rename(relationships = cause)
trad_effects_long <- pivot_longer(q10_effects,
                                   cols = c("direct", "indirect", "total"),
                                   names_to = "effect_type",
                                   values_to = "effect_size")
d2 <- ggplot(trad_effects_long, aes(x = relationships, y = effect_size, fill = effect_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(x = NULL,y = "Standardized Effect") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "direct" = "#008CB7",
      "indirect" = "#A5C98C",
      "total" = "#FFBD00"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "direct" = "Direct Effect",
      "indirect" = "Indirect Effect",
      "total" = "Total Effect"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(position = "right", limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  theme_bw()  +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", size = 0.5) 
print(d2)

```

```{r}
eco<- terra::rast("data/Ecoregions_5_classes_0.05.tif")
eco_df <- as.data.frame(eco, xy = TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
colnames(eco_df)[3] <- "class_id"
class_colors <- c(
  "1" = "#1b7837",   # forest
  "2" = "#e08214",   # shrubland
  "3" = "#a6dba0",   # grassland
  "4" = "lightgray", # desert
  "5" = "#FAECA8"    # cropland
)
class_labels <- c(
  "1" = "Forest","2" = "Shrubland", "3" = "Grassland","4" = "Desert",  "5" = "Cropland")


landcover_df <- IGBP_koppen %>%
  dplyr::select(Longitude, Latitude, IGBP)

srdb_v4 <- srdb_v4 %>%
  filter(!is.na(Longitude) & !is.na(Latitude))%>%
  filter(!is.na(RC_annual))

srdb_sub <- srdb_sub %>%
  filter(!is.na(Longitude) & !is.na(Latitude))

partition_df <- srdb_v4 %>%
  filter(Partition_method != "" & !is.na(Partition_method)) %>%
  group_by(Partition_method) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Count = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
  mutate(
    Prop = Count / sum(Count),
    Label = paste0(Partition_method, " (", Count, ")"))
partition_raw <- srdb_v4 %>%
  filter(Partition_method != "" & !is.na(Partition_method)) %>%
  group_by(Partition_method) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Count = dplyr::n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(Count))
partition_df <- partition_raw %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Partition_method = ifelse(dplyr::row_number() <= 4, Partition_method, "Other")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Partition_method) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Count = sum(Count)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Prop = Count / sum(Count),
    Label = paste0(Partition_method, " (", Count, ")"))  %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    percent_label = paste0(Partition_method, "\n", sprintf("%.2f%%", Prop * 100))
  )
partition_df <- partition_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Partition_method)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(ypos = cumsum(Prop) - 0.5 * Prop) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(outside = Prop < 0.1)
partition_big <- partition_df %>% filter(!outside)
partition_small <- partition_df %>% filter(outside)

pie_plot <- ggplot(partition_df, aes(x = 1.6, y = Prop, fill = Partition_method)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.45, color = "white") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y", start = pi-pi* (30 / 180) ) +
  xlim(0.5, 2.5) +
  geom_text(data = partition_big,
            aes(y = ypos, x = 1.4, label = percent_label),
            color = "black", size = 2.5, hjust = -0.1, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(data = partition_small,
            aes(y = ypos, x = 2.1, label = percent_label, fontface = "bold"),
            color = "black", size = 2.3, hjust = 0) +

    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(0, 0, 0, 0, unit = "mm")
  )
print(pie_plot)
pie_grob <- ggplotGrob(pie_plot)

eco_df <- as.data.frame(eco, xy = TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
colnames(eco_df)[3] <- "class_id"
eco_df_robin <- sf::st_as_sf(eco_df, coords = c("x", "y"), crs = 4326) %>%st_transform(crs = "+proj=robin")
coords_eco <- st_coordinates(eco_df_robin)
eco_df_robin <- cbind(as.data.frame(coords_eco), class_id = eco_df$class_id)

world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
world_robin <- st_transform(world, crs = "+proj=robin")
grat_robin <- sf::st_graticule(lat = seq(-60, 90, 30), lon = seq(-180, 180, 60)) %>%
  st_transform(crs = "+proj=robin")
srdb_sub_sf <- st_as_sf(srdb_sub, coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = 4326)
srdb_sub_robin <- st_transform(srdb_sub_sf, crs = "+proj=robin")
coords_srdb <- st_coordinates(srdb_sub_robin)
srdb_sub_df_robin <- cbind(as.data.frame(coords_srdb), YearsOfData = srdb_sub_robin$YearsOfData)

landcover_sf <- st_as_sf(landcover_df, coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = 4326)
landcover_sf_robin <- st_transform(landcover_sf, crs = "+proj=robin")
coords <- st_coordinates(landcover_sf_robin)
landcover_df_robin <- cbind(as.data.frame(coords), IGBP = landcover_sf_robin$IGBP)
landcover_df_robin <- landcover_df_robin %>%
  mutate(Ecosystem_simple = case_when(
    IGBP %in% c("ENF", "EBF", "DNF", "DBF", "MF") ~ "Forest",
    IGBP %in% c("GRA", "SAV", "WSA", "BSV")       ~ "Grassland",
    IGBP %in% c("OSH", "CSH", "CVM")                     ~ "Shrubland",
    IGBP %in% c("CRO")                     ~ "Cropland",
    IGBP == "URB"                                 ~ "Urban",
    TRUE                                          ~ "Other"
  ))
landcover_points <- landcover_df_robin %>%dplyr::select(X, Y, IGBP)
srdb_sub_points <- srdb_sub_df_robin %>%dplyr::select(X, Y)
nn <- RANN::nn2(data = landcover_points[, c("X", "Y")],query = srdb_sub_points[, c("X", "Y")],k = 1)
nearest_index <- nn$nn.idx[, 1]
srdb_sub_df_robin$IGBP <- landcover_points$IGBP[nearest_index]
srdb_sub_df_robin <- srdb_sub_df_robin %>%
  mutate(Ecosystem_simple = case_when(
    IGBP %in% c("ENF", "EBF", "DNF", "DBF", "MF") ~ "Forest",
    IGBP %in% c("GRA", "SAV", "WSA", "BSV")       ~ "Grassland",
    IGBP %in% c("OSH", "CSH", "CVM")             ~ "Shrubland",
    IGBP %in% c("CRO")                     ~ "Cropland",
    IGBP == "URB"                                 ~ "Urban",
    TRUE                                          ~ "Other"
  ))
srdb_sub_df_robin %>%
  dplyr::count(Ecosystem_simple) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
size_legend_plot <- ggplot(data = srdb_sub_df_robin, aes(x = X, y = Y, size = YearsOfData)) +
  geom_point(color = "red", alpha = 0.8, shape = 1) +
   scale_size_continuous(name = "Years of Count") + 
  guides(size = guide_legend(
    direction = "horizontal",
    title.position = "top",
    title.hjust = 0.5
  )) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.6), color = NA)
  )
size_legend <- get_legend(size_legend_plot)

class_colors <- c(
  "1" = "#1b7837",   # Forest
  "2" = "#fac074",   # Shrubland
  "3" = "#a6dba0",   # Grassland
  "5" = "#FAECA8"    # Cropland
)

legend_labels <- c(
  "1" = "Forest (54.02%)",
  "5" = "Cropland (11.49%)",
  "3" = "Grassland (20.69%)",
  "2" = "Shrubland (13.79%)")

main_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world_robin, fill = "gray95", color = "white", size = 0.2) +
    geom_sf(data = grat_robin, color = "gray80", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_tile(data = eco_df_robin,aes(x = X, y = Y, fill = as.factor(class_id)),
            width = 100000, height = 100000) +
  geom_jitter(data = srdb_sub_df_robin,
              aes(x = X, y = Y, size = YearsOfData),
              color = "red", alpha = 0.7, shape = 1 ) +
  scale_size_continuous(guide = "none") +  
scale_fill_manual(
  values = class_colors,
  name = "Ecosystem",
  labels = legend_labels
)+
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-18000000, 18000000),
    ylim = c(-8000000, 10000000),
    crs = "+proj=robin", expand = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8), 
    legend.position = c(0.01, 0.75),
    legend.justification = c("left", "center"),
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.6), color = NA),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold")
  )
print(main_map)

final_plot <- ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(main_map, x = 0, y = 0, width = 1, height = 1) +  # 地图铺满
  draw_plot(pie_plot, x = -0.1, y = 0.02, width = 0.5, height = 0.45)+  # 饼图嵌图
  draw_plot(size_legend, x = 0.35, y = 0.85, width = 0.3, height = 0.15)+
  draw_plot_label(label = "(b)", x = 0.05, y = 0.38, size = 12)+ 
  draw_plot_label(label = "(a)", x = 0.01, y = 0.95, size = 12) 
print(final_plot)
#ggsave("outputs/SRDB_SITES.png", plot = final_plot, width = 9, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- read.csv( "data/MGRsD_update_with_IGBP.csv")
srdb_v5 <- read.csv(paste0(DATA_DIR, '/', 'srdb_v5.csv'), header = T) # SRDB_V5 数据
srdb_v5_unique <- srdb_v5 %>%
  distinct(Site_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- left_join(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, srdb_v5_unique[, c("Site_ID", "YearsOfData", "Study_midyear")], by = "Site_ID")

density_plot <- ggplot(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, aes(x = Study_midyear)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), binwidth = 2, fill = "gray80", color = "white", alpha = 0.7) +  # 浅灰色柱子
  geom_density(color = "black", size = 0.6) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Study Year", y = "Density") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.6), color = NA),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),               
    panel.border = element_blank(),             
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), 
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )
print(density_plot)

Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  filter(!is.na(IGBP))  
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  filter(IGBP != "BSV") %>% 
  mutate(
    IGBP_group = case_when(
      IGBP %in% c("DBF", "EBF", "ENF", "MF") ~ "Forest", 
      IGBP %in% c("CSH", "OSH","CVM") ~ "Shrubland",            
      IGBP %in% c("GRA", "WSA") ~ "Grassland", 
      IGBP == "CRO" ~ "Cropland",                          
      TRUE ~ "Other"                         
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(IGBP_group)) 

Q10_sf <- st_as_sf(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = 4326)
Q10_robin <- st_transform(Q10_sf, crs = "+proj=robin")
coords_Q10 <- st_coordinates(Q10_robin)
Q10_df_robin <- cbind(
  as.data.frame(coords_Q10),
  YearsOfData = Q10_robin$YearsOfData,
  IGBP_group = Q10_robin$IGBP_group
)
Q10_df_robin %>%
  dplyr::count(IGBP_group) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

legend_labels <- c(
   "1" = "Forest (94)",
  "5" = "Cropland (36)",
  "3" = "Grassland (81)",
  "2" = "Shrubland (31)"
)

main_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world_robin, fill = "gray95", color = "white", size = 0.2) +
    geom_sf(data = grat_robin, color = "gray80", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_tile(data = eco_df_robin, aes(x = X, y = Y, fill = as.factor(class_id)),
            width = 100000, height = 100000) +
  geom_jitter(data = Q10_df_robin,
              aes(x = X, y = Y, size = YearsOfData),
              color = "red", alpha = 0.7, shape = 1) +
  scale_size_continuous(guide = "none") +  
scale_fill_manual(
  values = class_colors,name = "Ecosystem",labels = legend_labels)+
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-18000000, 18000000), ylim = c(-8000000, 10000000),
    crs = "+proj=robin", expand = FALSE ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8), 
    legend.position = c(0.01, 0.76),
    legend.justification = c("left", "center"),
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.6), color = NA),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold")
  )
print(main_map)

final_plot2 <- ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(main_map, x = 0, y = 0, width = 1, height = 1) +  # 地图铺满
  draw_plot(density_plot, x = 0.02, y = 0.05, width = 0.3, height = 0.28)+  # 饼图嵌图
  draw_plot(size_legend, x = 0.35, y = 0.85, width = 0.3, height = 0.15)+
  draw_plot_label(label = "(d)", x = 0.05, y = 0.38, size = 12)+ 
  draw_plot_label(label = "(c)", x = 0.01, y = 0.95, size = 12) 
print(final_plot)
#ggsave("outputs/MGRsD_SITES.png", plot = final_plot, width = 9, height = 4.5, dpi = 300) 

  combined_plot <- ggarrange(
  final_plot, final_plot2, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1))
#ggsave("outputs/SUPFIG1.png", plot = combined_plot, width = 9, height = 9, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#Prepare data for PLSPM
#prec_list <- list.files("data/wc10", pattern = "^prec[0-9]+\\.bil$", full.names = TRUE)
#prec_stack <- rast(prec_list)  
#prec_mean <- terra::app(prec_stack, fun = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
#writeRaster(prec_mean, "data/precipitation.tif", overwrite = TRUE)
#tmean_list <- list.files("data/wc10", pattern = "^tmean[0-9]+\\.bil$", full.names = TRUE)
#tmean_stack <- rast(tmean_list)  
#tmean_mean <- terra::app(tmean_stack, fun = sum, na.rm = TRUE)
#writeRaster(tmean_mean, "data/temperature.tif", overwrite = TRUE)
#prec <- terra::rast("data/precipitation.tif")
#temp <- terra::rast("data/temperature.tif")
#ai <- terra::rast("data/Global-AI_ET0_annual_v3/ai_v3_yr.tif")
#et0 <- terra::rast("data/Global-AI_ET0_annual_v3/et0_v3_yr.tif")
#agb <- terra::rast("data/agb.tif")
#bgb <- terra::rast("data/bgb.tif")
#gpp <- terra::rast("data/fluxcom_gpp2.tif")
#evi <- terra::rast("data/EVI_mean.tif")
#n_dec <- terra::rast("data/global_mean_Nitrogen_depostion_1980_2017_half_degree.tif")
#AM <- terra::rast("data/MycDistrAM_current.tif")
#EcM <- terra::rast("data/MycDistrEM_current.tif")
#ErM <- terra::rast("data/MycDistrER_current.tif")
#NM <- terra::rast("data/MycDistrNM_current.tif")
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- read.csv( "MGRsD_update_with_IGBP.csv")
clay <- terra::rast("data/soilGRIDS/CLYPPT_M_sl2_250m_ll.tif")
silt <- terra::rast("data/soilGRIDS/SLTPPT_M_sl2_250m_ll.tif")
cec <- terra::rast("data/soilGRIDS/CECSOL_M_sl2_250m_ll.tif")
ph_kcl <- terra::rast("data/soilGRIDS/PHIKCL_M_sl2_250m_ll.tif")
bd <- terra::rast("data/soilGRIDS/BLDFIE_M_sl2_250m_ll.tif")
soc<- terra::rast("data/soilGRIDS/ORCDRC_M_sl2_250m_ll.tif")
# Extract the longitude and latitude information from Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh to create site_points
site_points <- vect(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, geom = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = crs(clay))
soil_proper <- terra::extract(c(clay, silt, cec, ph_kcl, bd, soc), site_points, ID = TRUE)
colnames(soil_proper) <- c("ID","CLY", "SLT", "CEC", "PHIKCL", "BD", "ORC")
ref_raster <- bd
gpp_resampled <- resample(gpp, ref_raster, method = "bilinear")
evi_resampled <- resample(evi, ref_raster, method = "bilinear")
n_dec_resampled <- resample(n_dec, ref_raster, method = "bilinear")
gpp_resampled <- crop(gpp_resampled, ref_raster)
evi_resampled <- crop(evi_resampled, ref_raster)
n_dec_resampled <- crop(n_dec_resampled, ref_raster)

plant <- terra::extract(c(agb, bgb, gpp_resampled, evi_resampled, n_dec_resampled), site_points, ID = TRUE)
colnames(plant) <- c("ID","AGB", "BGB", "GPP", "EVI", "N_DEC")
ai_resampled <- resample(ai, prec)
et0_resampled <- resample(et0, prec)
soil_climate <- terra::extract(c(prec, temp, ai_resampled, et0_resampled), site_points, ID = TRUE)
colnames(soil_climate) <- c("ID", "prec_mean", "temp_mean", "ai_resampled", "et0_resampled")
soil_bio <- terra::extract(c(AM, EcM, ErM, NM), site_points, ID = TRUE)
colnames(soil_bio) <- c("ID", "AM", "EcM", "ErM", "NM")
combined <- left_join(soil_proper, soil_climate, by = "ID")
combined2 <- left_join(combined , plant, by = "ID")
SOIL_DATA <- left_join(combined2, soil_bio, by = "ID")
SOIL_DATA <- SOIL_DATA %>% 
   dplyr::mutate(row_id = row_number())  
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>% 
   dplyr::mutate(row_id = row_number()) %>%  
  left_join(SOIL_DATA, by = "row_id") %>%  
  dplyr::select(-row_id)  

world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
site_points_sf <- st_as_sf(site_points)
sitemap <- ggplot() + 
  geom_sf(data = world, fill = "gray90", color = "gray60") +  # 世界地图
  geom_sf(data = site_points_sf, size = 2, alpha = 0.8, color = "red") +  # 站点
  labs(
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_sf( xlim = c(-180, 180), ylim = c(-60, 90), expand = FALSE )
print(sitemap)

Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh %>%
  mutate(
    clay_temp_ratio = CLY / temp_mean,
    cec_clay_ratio  = CEC / CLY,
    clay_silt_sum   = CLY + SLT,
    Qa_Qh           = Q10_Ra / Q10_Rh
  )
```


```{r}
MBC_list <- list.files(path = "data/MBC_resample1_pred_all_vars", pattern = "resample1_all_\\d{4}\\.rds", full.names = TRUE)
raster_MBC <- lapply(MBC_list, readRDS)
site_coords <- terra::crds(site_points)
variables <- c("elev", "nitrogen", "pred")
extracted_data <- lapply(variables, function(var) {
  matrix(NA, nrow = nrow(site_coords), ncol = length(raster_MBC))
})
names(extracted_data) <- variables
for (i in seq_along(raster_MBC)) {
  current_df <- raster_MBC[[i]]
    current_df <- current_df[!is.na(current_df$x) & !is.na(current_df$y), ]
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(site_coords))) {
    lon <- site_coords[j, 1]
    lat <- site_coords[j, 2]
    dists <- sqrt((current_df$x - lon)^2 + (current_df$y - lat)^2)
    closest_index <- which.min(dists)
    if (length(closest_index) > 0 && closest_index <= nrow(current_df)) {
      for (var in variables) {
        extracted_data[[var]][j, i] <- current_df[closest_index, var]
      }
    } else {
      for (var in variables) {
        extracted_data[[var]][j, i] <- NA
      }
    }
  }
}
average_data <- lapply(extracted_data, function(data) {
  rowMeans(data, na.rm = TRUE)
})
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$elev_avg <- average_data$elev
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$nitrogen_avg <- average_data$nitrogen
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$pred_avg <- average_data$pred

maoc_poc <- read.csv( "data/MAOC_POC/MAOC_POC.csv")
maoc_poc <- maoc_poc[!is.na(maoc_poc$lon) & !is.na(maoc_poc$lat), ]
maoc_values <- numeric(nrow(site_coords))
poc_values <- numeric(nrow(site_coords))
for (i in seq_len(nrow(site_coords))) {
  lon <- site_coords[i, 1]
  lat <- site_coords[i, 2]
  dists <- sqrt((maoc_poc$lon - lon)^2 + (maoc_poc$lat - lat)^2)
  closest_index <- which.min(dists)
  if (length(closest_index) > 0 && closest_index <= nrow(maoc_poc)) {
    maoc_values[i] <- maoc_poc$MAOC[closest_index]
    poc_values[i] <- maoc_poc$POC[closest_index]
  } else {
    maoc_values[i] <- NA
    poc_values[i] <- NA
  }
}
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$MAOC <- maoc_values
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$POC <- poc_values
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Qa.Qh <- ifelse(!is.na(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra) & !is.na(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh), 
                              Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Ra / Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$Q10_Rh, 
                              NA)
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$clay_temp_ratio <- ifelse(!is.na(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$CLY) & !is.na(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$temp_mean), 
                              Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$CLY / Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$temp_mean, 
                              NA)
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$cec_clay_rati <- ifelse(!is.na(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$CEC) & !is.na(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$CLY), 
                              Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$CEC / Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$CLY, 
                              NA)
Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$C_N_rati <- ifelse(!is.na(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$ORC) & !is.na(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$nitrogen_avg), 
                              Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$ORC / Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh$nitrogen_avg, 
                              NA)
#write.csv(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, "pca_data.csv")
```

```{r}
#Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- read.csv( data"/pca_data.csv")
#ALd <- terra::rast("data/FeAl/Ald_0-30cm.tif")
#ALo <- terra::rast("data/FeAl/Alo_0-30cm.tif")
#ALp <- terra::rast("data/FeAl/Alp_0-30cm.tif")
#Fed <- terra::rast("data/FeAl/Fed_0-30cm.tif")
#Feo <- terra::rast("data/FeAl/Feo_0-30cm.tif")
#Fep <- terra::rast("data/FeAl/Fep_0-30cm.tif")
#OC_Fe <- terra::rast("data/FeAl/OC-Fe_0-30cm_kgm2.tif")

site_points_ll <- terra::vect(
  Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh,
  geom = c("Longitude", "Latitude"),
  crs  = "EPSG:4326"
)
site_points_prj <- terra::project(site_points_ll, terra::crs(ALd))

ras_stack <- c(ALd, ALo, ALp, Fed, Feo, Fep, OC_Fe)
soil_FeAl <- terra::extract(ras_stack, site_points_prj, ID = TRUE)
colnames(soil_FeAl) <- c("ID","ALd", "ALo", "ALp", "Fed", "Feo", "Fep", "OC_Fe")
soil_FeAl2 <- soil_FeAl[, -1]
#Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh <- cbind(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, soil_FeAl2)
#write.csv(Q10_Rs_Ra_Rh, "pca_data.csv")
```
